title: phyllostegia secunda
intro: Phyllostegia secunda, also known as Hawaiian lilac or heliotrope, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Phyllostegia secunda include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Phyllostegia secunda are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
